---
title: "slumbR"
subtitle: "R tools for sleep diary research"
description: "An R package for processing, scoring, and visualising sleep diary data collected with the Sleep Diaries app."
date: "2025-01-01"
image: ../images/slumbr_logo.svg
categories: [R Package, Sleep, Open Source]
---

## About

slumbR is the official R companion to the Sleep Diaries app. When a study ends, participants export their data as a JSON file. slumbR reads those files — one per participant or in batch — computes sleep diary variables, and returns tidy data frames ready for statistical analysis.

## Features

- Import Sleep Diaries JSON exports (single file or batch)
- Compute standard sleep diary variables (sleep onset, wake time, total sleep time, sleep efficiency, and more)
- Tidy output compatible with the tidyverse
- Visualisation helpers for sleep diary data

## Links

- 🌐 [Documentation](https://slumbr.circadia-lab.uk)
- 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/circadia-bio/slumbR)
- 📱 [Sleep Diaries app](https://sleepdiaries.circadia-lab.uk)
